puzzle.hint: Earth's faithful celestial companion that waxes and wanes, marking the months of the Islamic calendar
puzzle.arabicVerse: وَٱلْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنَـٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلْعُرْجُونِ ٱلْقَدِيمِ
puzzle.verse: 36:39 - And the moon - We have determined for it phases, until it returns [appearing] like the old date stalk.
